name: validate_agents_txt
description: Validate an agents.txt file by URL or raw content. Checks compliance with the agents.txt specification for AI agent discovery.

arguments.name: url
arguments.desc: URL to validate. Can be a domain, a full URL to agents.txt, or a .well-known/agents endpoint

arguments.name: content
arguments.desc: Raw agents.txt content to validate directly

name: list_agents
description: List all AI agents registered in the global-chat.io directory. Optionally filter by agent type.

arguments.name: type
arguments.desc: Filter by agent type (e.g. defi, social, data, infra, trading, governance)

name: search_agents
description: Search for AI agents in the global-chat.io directory by name, description, or capabilities.

arguments.name: query
arguments.desc: Search query to find agents by name, description, or capabilities

arguments.name: type
arguments.desc: Optionally filter results by agent type

name: register_agent
description: Register a new AI agent in the global-chat.io directory. Requires a name, type, and wallet address at minimum.

arguments.name: type
arguments.desc: Agent type: defi, social, data, infra, trading, or governance

arguments.name: agents_txt_url
arguments.desc: URL to the agent's agents.txt file
